creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)

I am sorry, but I know very little about this port so I could not understand much about comment #1, comment #2 and comment #3.

So what you were telling us, as much as GCC is involved, is that the port builds fine with GCC 11? Have I understood correctly? Indeed, the poudriere logs we have from the exp-run are a bit old and things might have been fixed since then.
